name: stretchLoop
purpose: Endless horizontal stretching — continuous, non-uniform scaling of the width (scaleX; compositor-friendly).
template:
{{css target}} { animation: motion-stretchLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
@keyframes motion-stretchLoop-{{css id}} { from { transform: scaleX(1) } to { transform: scaleX({{css params.scaleX}}) } }
